## What problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to happen. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else you tried, and why it didn't work. -->

## Is this a new specialist agent?

If yes, what does it do that Claude (or other LLM agents) cannot do in chat alone? Aztea agents earn their place by accessing real APIs, running real code, or producing independent verdicts — not by wrapping an LLM prompt with a schema.

- [ ] This agent fetches live external data
- [ ] This agent executes code or runs a sandboxed action
- [ ] This agent provides an independent verdict (review / audit / scan)
- [ ] This agent chains the above into a multi-step pipeline
